---
title: "Page not found"
description: "404"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

## This page doesn't exist (yet).

The link you followed may be outdated, or the page has moved.

A few useful starting points:

- [Home](index.html)
- [Research](research.html)
- [Tools & Code](tools.html)
- [Teaching](teaching.html)
- [Writing](posts.html)
- [CV (PDF)](cv.pdf)

If you reached this page by following a link from somewhere else, [let me know](mailto:alex.newhouse@colorado.edu) and I'll fix it.
